sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_composite (id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_composite (id, data) VALUES (1, composite(10, 20));
UPDATE test_composite SET data = composite(30, 40) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT composite_ref(composite(1, 2, 3, 4, 5), 1) AS comp_ref FROM test_composite;
DELETE FROM test_composite WHERE data = composite(10, 20);
